overview: A premium, fully responsive travel agency website for Hop Stone Tours & Travels — featuring 12 service categories, tour package showcases, contact section with WhatsApp and call integrations, floating action buttons, and a luxurious olive-green branded design.
features: Full-width hero with WhatsApp and Call CTA buttons
Contact section with contact form and click-to-call
Always-visible floating WhatsApp and Call buttons
Responsive design for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Smooth scroll animations and premium transitions
About Us and Why Choose Us sections
Professional footer with quick links and social icons
